title: Forged receipt to unauthorized mint via handle_receive_message
evidence: message_transmitter::receive_message validates attestation and destination domain before creating Receipt
token_messenger::handle_receive_message validates receipt recipient equals token messenger object and sender matches configured remote token messenger
complete_receive_message enforces recipient signer and consumes receipt

title: Attestation replay/malleability via duplicate signatures
evidence: attester::verify_attestation_signature enforces exact attestation length = threshold*65
strictly increasing recovered attester addresses prevents duplicates/out-of-order signatures
